assertion_results.text: Output file AGENTS.md exists in project root
Identifies project as a skill repository
assertion_results.evidence: Repository Settings: 'License: MIT (code) + CC-BY-SA-4.0 (content)', 'Entity name: Netresearch DTT GmbH', 'Release: Tag-triggered via netresearch/skill-repo-skill reusable workflow'. Terminology: 'Skill | Agent Skills specification package -- portable AI agent knowledge'. File Map references '.claude-plugin/plugin.json -> Skill plugin metadata'.
File Map: 'skills/cli-tools/SKILL.md -> Skill definition: triggers, capabilities, workflows, script/reference index'

assertion_results.text: Lists scripts if any exist in the repo
assertion_results.evidence: Commands table lists 6 scripts: install_tool.sh, check_environment.sh, detect_project_type.sh, auto_update.sh, detect_missing_tool.py. File Map details scripts/installers/ and scripts/lib/ directories.

assertion_results.text: Does NOT contain irrelevant build/compile instructions
assertion_results.evidence: Commands section focuses on linting (markdownlint, yamllint, shellcheck) and skill-specific scripts (install_tool.sh, check_environment.sh). No build/compile instructions present. No 'make build', no 'go build', no 'npm run build'.

assertion_results.text: Mentions the skill's purpose from SKILL.md description
assertion_results.evidence: Heuristics section describes skill purpose through actions: 'Adding a new tool -> Create catalog/<tool>.json', 'Tool has GitHub releases -> Set install_method: auto', 'Adding installer -> Create skills/cli-tools/scripts/installers/<method>.sh'. Codebase State: 'PostToolUse hook auto-detects command not found errors via Python script', 'Reconciliation system tries methods by priority until one succeeds'.

assertion_results.text: Structure is concise (under 100 lines for a simple skill repo)
assertion_results.evidence: 153 lines. This is a complex skill repo (74+ catalog entries, 9 installers, 8 libraries, Python hook), so 153 lines is reasonable for the content. However, it exceeds the 100-line threshold specified in the assertion.

qualitative.structure_quality: Excellent. Uses all the standard AGENTS-GENERATED sections: commands, file map, golden samples, utilities, heuristics, repo settings, boundaries, codebase state, terminology.
qualitative.conciseness: Good for the complexity. 153 lines covers a substantial skill repo with catalog system, installers, hooks, and shared libraries. Each section is dense and actionable.
qualitative.accuracy: Excellent. Script paths, catalog counts (74+), installer counts (9), library counts (8) all verifiable. License split (MIT + CC-BY-SA-4.0) and entity name (Netresearch DTT GmbH) are correct per project conventions.
qualitative.usefulness_for_agents: Excellent. Golden samples point to specific reference files (ripgrep.json, ruff.json, github_release_binary.sh). Heuristics cover the most common tasks (adding tool, adding installer, modifying detection hook). Boundaries prevent common mistakes.
